summary: Regression test PASSED. All 4 keyword patterns (SSN hyphen, SSN no-hyphen, card hyphen, AC password) triggered block on chatgpt.com. Warning displayed for 2/4 tests; other 2 showed infinite loading (block effective but warning not rendered).

test_results.detail: Warning displayed: '⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' No AI response. Block effective with warning.
No AI response — stuck on loading indicator (black dot) for 35+ seconds. Block effective but warning message NOT displayed. Session became stuck, tab eventually crashed on navigation.
Warning displayed: '⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' No AI response. Block effective with warning. New chat session after tab crash recovery.
No AI response — stuck on loading indicator (black dot). Block effective but warning message NOT displayed. Same pattern as test 2.

warning_consistency_note.pattern: Warning displayed on fresh chat (first message). When second message sent in same chat after block, warning not rendered — only infinite loading. This may be related to how ChatGPT handles follow-up messages after a blocked response.
